author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: implementing CUDA graph capture now. The gpu_embed_lookup eliminates the Embedding CPU roundtrip but doesn't reduce the 600 CUDA API calls. Only CUDA graphs can batch those into a single launch. Plan: (1) allocate fixed input/output buffers, (2) warm-up decode run, (3) stream capture the next decode run, (4) instantiate graph, (5) for each token: memcpy token into fixed buffer, graph.launch(), memcpy logits out. The token/position values are written to fixed GPU addresses via H→D memcpy before each launch — the graph reads from those same addresses.
